builders-club-prep.notes: Brad presenting LS Hub + Slop at Builders Club. Create presentation brief, demo flow script, pre-demo checklist, fallback screenshots. No code — documentation and preparation.

entity-extraction-audit.notes: Extraction logic duplicated in processing.ts and cron route. Race condition on dedup. No audit trail. Consolidate into shared entityExtractor.ts, fix dedup, validate AINews frontmatter, centralize explanation templates, extend blocklist.

Part 2: Fix deduplication race condition (deduplicate before processing)
Part 3: Add AINews frontmatter validation
Part 4: Centralize explanation templates

Part 6: Extend blocklist and make configurable

entity-extraction-audit.title: Entity extraction pipeline audit & cleanup — deduplicate code, fix race conditions, add audit trail

eval-suite.notes: Proper eval system with golden test cases (10-15 scenarios), automated runner, and scoring. Extends /evals dashboard with scenario results + comparison. References RA-H eval system. Cross-repo: needs Slop's soul file.

eval-suite.title: Eval suite — golden dataset, automated scenario testing, scoring dashboard

evals-dashboard.notes: Fix broken bot logging (column mismatch), capture tool calls + MCP operations + timing, build /evals dashboard to review traces. Uses existing chats table — no migration needed.

guides-to-skills.notes: Full port of RA-H's guides→skills migration. Two skill categories: system (db-operations, curation) and guides (welcome, agent-engineering, context-engineering, mcp-quickstart, slop). Rename all surfaces (service, tools, API, MCP, UI). Add read-only guide browsing in UI. Consolidate 5 MCP standalone guides into 1 db-operations skill. ~30 files affected.

Part 7: Delete old guide files/components, update docs

inbox.notes: New /inbox route showing all Discord interactions grouped by user as conversations. Detail view per conversation. Inbox stats on dashboard. Reuses chats table. Future: email integration.

inbox.title: Inbox — conversation-style view of all bot interactions (Discord now, email later)

member-nodes.notes: Adds 'member' node type, /join slash command, member-aware interactions (lookup before response, update after response), compounding knowledge per user. Changes span both latent-space-hub (type + category) and latent-space-bots (slash command + member lifecycle).

member-nodes.title: Member nodes — community members as first-class nodes in the knowledge graph

member-profiles.notes: Two changes: (1) Bot captures Discord avatar URL in metadata on /join and refreshes on each interaction. (2) Hub FocusPanel renders a member profile card (avatar, role, company, location, interests, stats) when viewing member nodes. Data already exists in metadata — just not displayed.
